description: Working model/preset mapping for local Codex projects. Verify current model IDs and parameter support against official OpenAI docs before implementation.

fast.label: Fast
fast.intent: Lowest latency/cost for triage, simple classification, lightweight extraction, and UI previews.

balanced.label: Balanced
balanced.intent: Good default for ordinary documents where speed matters but quality still matters.

quality.label: Quality
quality.intent: High-quality extraction and synthesis for difficult documents and engineering drawings.

max_quality.label: Max Quality / Review
max_quality.intent: Best available review/arbitration pass. May be slower and more expensive.

engineering_fast_index.label: Engineering Fast Index
engineering_fast_index.intent: Fast engineering drawing pre-pass for sheet classification and region proposal only.

engineering_review.label: Engineering Review
engineering_review.intent: Review critical or conflicting engineering drawing outputs.

notes: Keep this file in project config or skills/references. Do not put model choices in .env.
Treat model IDs and supported arguments as changeable. Check official OpenAI docs before relying on exact names.
For GPT-5.5 vision, prefer image_detail original for dense drawings when supported.
For mini/nano models, prefer high unless official docs confirm original support.
Do not use image generation models for image understanding.
